mobileActionSheet.title: Equipment actions

viewDetail.label: View details
viewDetail.description: Full equipment information, history, and tabs

viewQr.label: View QR code
viewQr.description: View and print this equipment's QR code

requestCheckout.label: Request checkout
requestCheckout.description: Request checkout for calibration, repair, or rental

markCheckoutReturned.label: Mark as returned
markCheckoutReturned.description: Record return of equipment you currently have checked out

reportNc.label: Report non-conformance
reportNc.description: Report a defect or malfunction found in the field

mobileActionSheet.noActionsDescription: Your account has no available actions on this equipment. Contact an administrator.

qrDisplay.title: Equipment QR code
qrDisplay.description: Scan with a phone camera to open the mobile landing page.
qrDisplay.buttonAriaLabel: View and print equipment QR code

printMode.sampler: Size sampler (all sizes on one page)
printMode.samplerDescription: Print and cut out the size you prefer.

qrDisplay.downloadFailed: Failed to generate PDF. Please try again later.

landing.notFoundBody: Verify the management number or check the QR label for damage. Temporary equipment (TEMP-*) can only be accessed from desktop.
landing.notFoundInvalidBody: Management number format is invalid. Example: SUW-E0001

labelPrint.title: Bulk QR label print
labelPrint.selectedCount: {count, plural, =0 {No equipment selected} one {Print QR label (#)} other {Print QR labels (#)}}
labelPrint.buttonAriaLabel: Generate and download QR label PDF for {count} selected equipment
labelPrint.generationFailed: QR label PDF generation failed. Please try again.
labelPrint.exceedMaxBatchBody: Selected count {count} exceeds recommended maximum {max}. Proceeding may slow down the browser.

scanner.title: QR Scan
scanner.scanningHint: Align the equipment QR code in the center
scanner.cameraDeniedBody: Allow camera permission in your browser settings, or enter the management number manually below.
scanner.cameraUnavailableBody: Not on HTTPS or device has no camera. Enter the management number manually.
scanner.manualEntryBody: If the QR is damaged or hard to scan, type the management number from the label.
scanner.genericError: Scanner failed to load. Use manual entry instead.

handover.buttonAriaLabel: Issue handover QR token for the other party to scan
handover.dialogDescription: The other party can scan this QR with their phone to go directly to the condition check page.

purpose.borrower_receive: Borrower confirms receipt of equipment (borrower_receive step)

handover.issueFailed: Failed to issue handover token. Please try again.
handover.instructions: Single-use QR, expires in 10 minutes. Consumed immediately when the other party scans it.
handover.redirectingBody: Taking you to the condition check page.
handover.invalidBody: QR format is invalid or tampered. Ask the other party to issue a new QR.
handover.expiredBody: This QR has expired (>10 minutes). Ask the other party to issue a new QR.
handover.consumedBody: This QR has already been consumed once and cannot be reused. Ask the other party to issue a new QR.
